GLOBAL_DESIGN_SYSTEM.pipeline_objective: Ingest flat, parsed static website data and systematically up-level it into a spatial, 3D dynamic experience featuring premium Three.js WebGL scenes, GSAP scroll-driven animations, and optional Sketchfab model embeds.

3D_spatial_rules.camera_rig: Each chapter with a 3D canvas gets its own <Canvas> instance from @react-three/fiber. Camera FOV: 45-60. Position z: 3-5 for model close-ups, z: 1 for full-scene particle fields. Enable subtle auto-rotation (0.05-0.2 rad/s) on hero models. Restrict OrbitControls to Y-axis rotation only (no flip).
3D_spatial_rules.depth_layers_z_axis: Background particle fields live at z: -5 to -10. 3D models live at z: 0 to 2. Typography planes sit strictly at CSS z-index: 10+ for crisp legibility. Cursor micro-interactions trigger +0.5 forward pull on hoverable 3D objects.

asset_loading_protocol.gltf_glb: Load via useGLTF from @react-three/drei. Files placed in /public/assets/. Use suspense boundary. Fallback: ambient particle field.
asset_loading_protocol.obj: Load via useLoader(OBJLoader, path) from @react-three/fiber. Same fallback.
asset_loading_protocol.sketchfab: Embed via <iframe> using Sketchfab's embed API: https://sketchfab.com/models/{uid}/embed. Responsive container with aspect-ratio control.
asset_loading_protocol.particle_field_default: Minimum 1500 particles, inSphere distribution (radius 1.5), color #a1a1aa, size 0.003-0.005. Scroll-linked parallax via GSAP ScrollTrigger.
asset_loading_protocol.performance_ceiling: All GLTF/GLB assets must be under 5MB. Apply Draco compression. Lazy-load canvases with React.Suspense.

timeline_architecture.hero_entrance: Master gsap.timeline() with choreographed delays: eyebrow (0s), title (+0.3s), subtitle (+0.5s), CTA button (+0.7s). Each element fade-up from y: 30-50px, opacity 0→1, ease: 'power3.out', duration: 0.8-1.2s.
timeline_architecture.section_reveals: Independent ScrollTrigger per section. Trigger: section top at 75% viewport. Stagger: 0.12-0.2s between child elements. scrub: 0.5-1 for scroll-linked progress.
timeline_architecture.micro_interactions: All buttons/GSAP hover: scale(1.03-1.05), duration 0.3s, ease: power2.out. Text underlines: scaleX(0→1) on hover. Card hover: y: translateY(-4px), box-shadow elevation.

scroll_trigger_rules.parallax_elements: Variable scrub speeds (0.5-2.0) for floating images to create Z-depth illusion. Slower elements appear further away.
scroll_trigger_rules.cleanup_required: All ScrollTriggers killed on unmount. Use useEffect cleanup return function.

gsap_motion_system.split_text_reveals: Headline text splits into individual words or characters for sequential reveal. gsap.from() with stagger: 0.05-0.08 per character. Used in TwoColumnValuePause and ClosingCallToAction.

rejection_triggers: No static image-only sections. Every section must have motion (GSAP, Three.js, or both).
No CSS-only hover states. All interactive elements require GSAP-powered micro-interactions.
No flat particle backgrounds on every canvas. Hero gets 3D model or scene; other sections get contextual 3D elements.
No auto-playing carousels or sliders. All transitions are scroll-linked or user-triggered.

premium_benchmarks.motion: Every scroll produces visible, meaningful animation. No dead scroll zones.
premium_benchmarks.3D: At least one WebGL canvas with real 3D content per project (model, scene, or interactive element).
premium_benchmarks.typography: Split-type text reveals on key headlines. Serif for headlines, sans-serif for body.
premium_benchmarks.spacing: 8rem-12rem vertical padding between chapters. 2rem-3rem inner component padding.

hierarchy_and_legibility_rules.sequential_gaze: Force the eye to move in strict sequence: Huge Bold Element (Primary) -> Medium Text (Secondary) -> Tiny Action/Date (Tertiary).
hierarchy_and_legibility_rules.digital_silence: Enforce heavy white space between sections. 3D canvases never bleed into adjacent content areas.
hierarchy_and_legibility_rules.text_overlay_legibility: When 3D canvas is behind text, apply translucent backdrop (rgba(9,9,11,0.4-0.6)) to guarantee readability.
hierarchy_and_legibility_rules.canvas_isolation: Each Canvas gets its own DOM container with position: absolute, inset: 0, zIndex: 0. Typography overlays at zIndex: 10+.

1_HeroSection.story_role: The Cinematic Mood Setter. Full-viewport 3D scene establishes premium atmosphere and brand presence.
structural_layout: Full-screen Three.js <Canvas> background (GLTF model OR ambient particle field as fallback).
Minimal top navigation: logo left, nav links center, CTA button right. mix-blend-mode: difference.
Massive serif headline centered over canvas, split-text GSAP reveal.
Short supporting tagline below, staggered GSAP fade-in.
Single primary CTA button with GSAP scale hover.
Scroll indicator at bottom: animated line with GSAP pulse.
1_HeroSection.gsap_sequence: Master timeline: eyebrow (y:20→0, opacity 0→1, 1s) → title split-text (stagger 0.06 per char, 1.2s) → subtitle (y:20→0, 1s, delay 0.5) → CTA button (y:20→0, 1s, delay 0.7) → scroll indicator fade (delay 1.0)
1_HeroSection.three_js: Canvas camera position [0,0,1], fov 50. If hero_3d_asset_url provided: load GLTF via useGLTF, center in scene, autoRotate speed 0.5. Fallback: 2000 particles inSphere radius 1.5, PointMaterial color #a1a1aa size 0.004 depthWrite false. Wireframe cube orbit.

inputs_extracted_from_static_site.brand_identity_logo: Clean URL string for brand mark.
inputs_extracted_from_static_site.hero_3d_asset_url: Optional. Path to GLTF/GLB file or Sketchfab model UID for hero 3D scene.

2_CollageIntroduction.story_role: The Humanizer. Transitions from hero into personal narrative with floating parallax imagery.
structural_layout: Chapter marker label (e.g., '02 / Origin DNA') with GSAP fade-in.
Single powerful sentence centered, serif font, GSAP split-word reveal.
3-4 floating images at different Z-rotations and parallax speeds.
Images have grayscale filter that desaturates on scroll progress.
2_CollageIntroduction.gsap_sequence: Chapter label (y:15→0, opacity 0→1, 0.8s) → statement split-word reveal (stagger 0.1 per word, scrollTrigger start top 70%) → floating images (scale 0.95→1, opacity 0→1, stagger 0.15) → parallax (y: variable per image, scrub 0.8-1.8)
2_CollageIntroduction.three_js: No dedicated canvas. Pure CSS/GSAP parallax on floating images.

inputs_extracted_from_static_site.introStatement: One powerful sentence for brand narrative.

3_StaticOfferingsGrid.story_role: The Offerings. Clean symmetric grid with 3D hover depth effect.
structural_layout: Chapter marker + section title + divider line header.
Strict 4-card symmetric grid (or 3 if only 3 items). 2px gap borders.
Each card: cover image (grayscale, desaturate on hover), title, description.
GSAP staggered card entrance: y:30→0, opacity 0→1, stagger 0.12.
Card hover: translateY(-6px), box-shadow elevation, image filter transition.
3_StaticOfferingsGrid.gsap_sequence: Chapter label (y:15→0, 0.8s) → title (y:20→0, 1s) → cards stagger (y:30→0, opacity 0→1, stagger 0.12) → hover micro-interactions (scale, shadow, y lift)
3_StaticOfferingsGrid.three_js: No dedicated canvas. CSS 3D perspective transforms on card hover for depth illusion.

inputs_extracted_from_static_site.offering_units: Array of { item_title, item_summary, item_cover_url }. Max 4 items.

4_TwoColumnValuePause.story_role: The Trust Builder. Asymmetric split with GSAP text reveals and optional Sketchfab 3D.
structural_layout: Strict two-column asymmetric grid: 1.2fr text / 1fr visual.
Left: chapter marker, bold serif headline (GSAP split-text), body paragraph.
Right: Sketchfab embed iframe OR high-res image with GSAP scale reveal.
6rem gap between columns.
4_TwoColumnValuePause.gsap_sequence: Chapter label (y:15→0, 0.8s) → headline split-text reveal (stagger 0.06 per char) → body text (y:20→0, 1s, delay 0.4) → right visual (scale 1.1→1, opacity 0→1, 1.5s, delay 0.3)
4_TwoColumnValuePause.three_js: Optional Sketchfab iframe embed if sketchfab_embed_uid provided. Else static image with GSAP reveal.

inputs_extracted_from_static_site.philosophy_anchor: Bold quote or statement for headline.
inputs_extracted_from_static_site.singular_master_visual: High-quality image URL for right column.
inputs_extracted_from_static_site.sketchfab_embed_uid: Optional Sketchfab model UID for 3D embed.

5_ClosingCallToAction.story_role: The Closer. Minimal terminal with particle atmosphere and GSAP CTA.
structural_layout: Chapter marker bar at top with thin divider line.
Full viewport height with Three.js gold particle field canvas.
Centered serif headline (GSAP scale + fade reveal).
Single large CTA button (GSAP pulse/breathing hover).
Minimal footer: copyright left, contact right.
5_ClosingCallToAction.gsap_sequence: Title (scale 0.95→1, y:30→0, opacity 0→1, 1.2s) → CTA button (y:20→0, opacity 0→1, 1s, delay 0.3) → button hover: GSAP scale pulse 1→1.05, box-shadow bloom
5_ClosingCallToAction.three_js: Canvas z:0. 350 gold particles (#c8a97e), size 0.05, opacity 0.25. Gentle rotation. Scroll-linked subtle position shift.
